home.title: We turn ideas into software systems worthy of ambitious companies
home.description: We build websites, web apps, admin panels, and operational software with clear architecture and polished user experience, turning strong ideas into reliable products that can grow.
home.whyTitle: Why serious teams trust our work
home.whyDescription: We combine business thinking with clean engineering: clear analysis, persuasive interfaces, secure backend foundations, and delivery that can evolve without rebuilding everything.
home.processTitle: A method that turns ideas into products
home.ctaTitle: Ready to build something worthy of your name?
home.ctaDescription: Send your idea and we will respond with a practical direction that clarifies the path, priorities, and what the project needs to look professional.

about.title: We build software systems that work seriously
about.description: We are not just page builders. We help founders and businesses turn ideas into structured, scalable, production-ready digital products.
about.visionBody: Software should become a real operational and growth tool, not a temporary interface or a quick visual layer.
about.missionBody: We build websites, apps, dashboards, desktop software, and integrations with clear architecture and reliable user experience.
about.valuesBody: Clarity, structure, security, performance, and respect for the end-user experience at every stage.

services.title: Services
services.description: Software services for companies that need digital presence, internal systems, and scalable products.
services.empty: No active services are available yet.

products.title: Systems
products.description: Software systems and platforms that can be customized and extended around each project.
products.empty: No systems are published right now.

portfolio.title: Work
portfolio.description: Selected work, projects, and systems prepared for presentation.
portfolio.empty: No work items are published right now.

blog.title: Insights
blog.description: Selected articles and insights about digital products, systems, and user experience.
blog.empty: No insights are published right now.

quote.title: Start Your Software Project
quote.description: Share the project or system you need, and we will turn it into a clear direction for design, architecture, timeline, and cost.
quote.success: Your project request has been sent successfully. We will review it and contact you soon.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.description: Send us your idea or question and we will help turn it into a clear, executable software direction.
contact.success: Your message has been sent successfully. We will review it and contact you.

legal.body: We handle visitor and client data responsibly and only for the purpose it was submitted for.
privacyBody: We respect visitor and client privacy. We only ask for information needed to communicate, review a request, or understand a project idea.
Information submitted through contact and quote forms is used to reply to inquiries, prepare initial directions, and improve service quality.
We do not sell your data or share it with external parties for marketing purposes. Trusted technical services may be used to operate the website, protect requests, and improve performance.
You can request data correction or deletion through the contact methods available on the website.
termsBody: Using this website means you agree to browse its content and contact us in a lawful and respectful way.
The content explains services and systems in general and does not represent a final price, timeline, or commitment until project requirements are reviewed and agreed upon.
Each project should have a clear scope covering requirements, deliverables, implementation phases, and delivery method before work begins.
We may update website content and usage terms as services and work methods evolve.

system.notFoundDescription: The page you are trying to open is not available.
system.maintenanceDescription: We are improving the experience. Please come back later.

unavailable.description: There are no published items in this section right now. You can return home or send your project details and we will contact you.

apps.title: Our Apps
apps.description: Public apps and utility tools available for direct use or download, with clear updates and support.

downloads.title: Download Center
downloads.description: Download links for available public apps and utility tools.
downloads.empty: No downloadable apps are available right now. Please check back later or contact us for available options.

support.title: Support Center
support.description: Send a clear support request for an app, system, or utility tool, and we will review it from the management console.
support.channelsDescription: Use the form or contact us through the available company support channels.
support.noChannels: No direct support channels have been configured yet. Use the form and we will review your request.
support.beforeDescription: The clearer the issue or question, the faster and more accurate the response can be.
tips: Mention the related app or product if available.
Describe the steps that led to the issue or what you need help with.
Include the version or operating system when the request is about an app.
support.formDescription: Fill in the details below and your request will be saved for follow-up.
support.noApp: General request without a specific app
support.success: Your support request has been sent successfully. We will review it and contact you.
support.error: Could not send the support request. Please try again later or use the direct contact details.
support.privacyNote: We use your information only to follow up on the support request and contact you.

publicIdentity.description: We design and build websites, web apps, admin panels, desktop software, and API integrations with a scalable technical foundation.

hero.eyebrow: A software company built around excellence

sections.whatWeBuildTitle: We build the interface, the system, and the logic behind both
sections.whatWeBuildDescription: Every project should serve a clear goal: build trust, organize operations, speed up work, or turn an idea into a dependable digital product.
sections.whyEyebrow: Standards that raise the project level
sections.processDescription: We start with discovery and analysis, then build architecture, UX, backend, and tests so the project launches organized, understandable, and ready to scale.
sections.techTitle: Modern technology that serves the goal, not the buzzwords
sections.techDescription: We choose the stack around the project needs and build clean foundations that balance performance, security, maintainability, and future growth.

websites.title: Professional websites
websites.description: Fast, persuasive company websites that communicate trust, present services, and turn visitors into qualified leads.

webApps.title: Web applications
webApps.description: Interactive applications built around real workflows, clear permissions, and practical user experience.

desktop.description: Operational desktop tools that help teams complete daily work with better speed and structure.

admin.description: Dashboards that manage content, requests, users, reports, and settings from one clear place.

apis.description: Payment, messaging, maps, and external service integrations with secure, scalable logic.

data.title: Databases and systems
data.description: Data modeling and business logic that protect information and let the system grow without chaos.

system.title: Centralized maintainable architecture
system.description: We organize components, styles, and logic so your project does not become chaotic over time.

security.title: Security and permissions from day one
security.description: Authentication, roles, logs, and data protection are part of the project foundation.

performance.title: Performance and usability
performance.description: We care about speed, clear flows, and the details users interact with daily.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.description: We define the goal, users, requirements, and problems to solve.

architecture.description: We design the technical structure, database, and interfaces before implementation.

launch.title: Launch
launch.description: We prepare the project for deployment, review, and continuous improvement.

publicAboutRedesign.panelDescription: We design every project as a complete system: interface, logic, data, permissions, performance, and scalability.

sections.identityTitle: A software company that thinks product-first
sections.identityDescription: We start by understanding the problem, then shape the solution around the user experience and technical foundation.
sections.valuesDescription: Every project should be clear, maintainable, user-friendly, and ready to evolve later.
sections.methodTitle: How we turn an idea into a system
sections.methodDescription: We follow a clear path that reduces randomness and gives every design and engineering decision a purpose.

structure.title: Structure before execution
structure.description: We do not start with pages immediately. We define architecture, components, data, and flows first.

trust.title: Trust and security
trust.description: We care about permissions, data protection, clear errors, and stable experiences.

performance.title: Performance and experience
performance.description: The interface should be fast, understandable, and comfortable for daily users.

workflow.description: We build in a way that supports adding services, products, and features later.

architecture.description: We plan the technical structure, data flows, and permissions before final design.

cta.title: Have an idea that needs a real system?
cta.description: Send us your project details and we will help turn it into a clear, executable plan.

publicContactRedesign.responseDescription: We read your request, understand the core need, and respond with a meaningful next step instead of generic replies.
publicContactRedesign.whatsappHint: Good for direct communication and sharing details.
publicContactRedesign.emailHint: Best for official requests and files.

privacy.title: Data privacy
privacy.description: We treat your information and message as private data.

review.title: Real review
review.description: We do not only send automated replies; we review the idea and define the best next step.

next.title: Clear next step
next.description: After contact, we define whether you need consultation, a quote, or requirements analysis.

publicQuoteRedesign.sideTitle: You do not need to know every technical detail
publicQuoteRedesign.sideDescription: Tell us what you want to build, and we will help organize the idea and define what the project really needs.
publicQuoteRedesign.beforeDescription: We treat your request as the first step toward a clear project direction, not just a message.

publicQuoteRedesign.projectTypesDescription: Whether it is a simple website or a full management system, the first step is understanding the real need.

approach.description: Every service follows an organized process that clarifies scope, reduces surprises, and keeps execution quality high.
